headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -89.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 81% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 163 quotes including 115 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction.
• The frustration score of 58.6 sits in the upper third of its 145-day range, showing elevated but not extreme levels.
• Fears improved notably from yesterday's low while optimism remained deeply negative despite a slight uptick.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
